title: verbascum × borbasianum
intro: Verbascum × borbasianum, also known as the yellow mullein or great mullein, is a hybrid plant belonging to the mullein genus, known for its tall spikes of yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis. The health benefits of Verbascum × borbasianum include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and alleviating symptoms of allergies and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
